reviews.review_description: How do you adjust your grip quickly? I wish it was controller-free and used hand tracking. So perhaps I could use paddle instead of the controller. I don't know if this is something that could be done but the first to figure that out will rule this space. 3 for now. change to 5 after I get a response

developer_response.body: Good idea but unfortunately hand tracking is not fast enough as compared to controller tracking. Plus there is no haptic feel. Many of our users get a grip adapter like this one to get the real feel of a paddle: https://formx.design/products/pickleballone

reviews.review_description: I always wanted to try the game and now I can because I don’t have to pay for it!
Worst game I've ever played the physics are not good I had my racket go through the ball so many times and the ais are even worse

developer_response.body: G-manKobee, please send us an email with details. support@playingames.net, we would like to understand when this is happening.
